document.title: CYAN PROJECT 설계 및 개발 관리 기록
document.documentType: 설계 및 개발 계획서, 입력서, 출력서, 검토서, 검증보고서, 유효성확인, 이관서 및 Part List
document.revisionOrVersion: 704-1 to 704-14 REV.00; Part List Rev No. 0

sourceSummary.oneLine: CYAN PROJECT GT1717C/GT1717CP design and development package covering inputs, outputs, reviews, verification, validation, transfer, part lists, and drawing records.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports design control traceability for medical device development, including legal and standards requirements, verification/validation evidence, MFDS certification planning, and production transfer records.
keyPoints: Design plan identifies product name GT1717C, GT1717CP; model CYAN PROJECT; part numbers PSM-200140 and PSM-200141.
Design input lists functional, performance, usability, safety, legal, standards, risk management, software, usability, and manufacturing requirements.

Legal requirements include Korean medical device law, enforcement rule, manufacturing and quality management standard, approval/report/review regulation, and electrical/mechanical safety common standard.
Planned certification activities include EMC/CB certification, CYBER security verification, MFDS certification, and FDA response.
Verification report records dimensional, weight, electrical safety, image quality, software, DICOM, and console software checks with results.
Validation records product SAFETY, EMC, vibration/drop reliability, and pressure reliability testing as passing.

concepts.name: Device Master Record
concepts.evidence: "1) DMR(설계도, 부품도, BOM, 공정도, 작업표준, 수입/공정/제품/설치 검사표준, 라벨, 사용자 메뉴얼, 설계 검증 보고서, 공정 밸리데이션 보고서, 소프트웨어 밸리데이션 보고서, 설계 밸리데이션 보고서)"

evidence.claim: The design plan covers product models GT1717C and GT1717CP under CYAN PROJECT.
The product part numbers are PSM-200140 and PSM-200141.
The development reason is new development.
The design plan schedules MFDS certification from 2025-10-01 to 2025-12-31 with MFDS materials including technical documents as output.
The design plan schedules FDA response from 2025-10-01 to around 2026-02.
Design inputs require wired image transmission support using LAN cable.
evidence.evidenceText: 유선 전송 지원,,,,,,영상 유선 전송 지원 (LAN Cable)

evidence.claim: Design inputs require compliance with ISO-4090 size.
Design inputs require A/D conversion support for 14 and 16 bit.
Design inputs require preview time within 2 seconds and cycle time within 5 seconds.
evidence.evidenceText: Preview Time,,,,,,2초 이내로 획득 ... Cycle Time,,,,,,Cycle Time 5초 이내

evidence.claim: Design inputs require AED function support.
Design inputs define use environment as 0 to 50°C, 20 to 75% humidity, and 70 to 106 kPa.
Design inputs identify electrical/mechanical safety standard IEC 60601-1:2020 CB.
Design inputs identify electromagnetic safety standard IEC 60601-1-2:2020 KOLAS.
Design inputs identify adapter certification standard IEC 62368:2018.

Legal requirements include Korean Medical Device Act, Enforcement Rule, medical device manufacturing and quality management standard, approval/report/review regulation, and common electrical/mechanical safety standard.
evidence.evidenceText:
"1. 의료기기법 (법률 제20888호)
2. 의료기기법 시행규칙 (총리령 제2029호)
3. 의료기기 제조 및 품질관리기준 (제2025-22호)
4. 의료기기 허가∙신고∙심사 등에 관한 규정 (제2023-80호)
5. 의료기기의 전기∙기계적 안전에 관한 공통기준규격 (제2020-29호)"

evidence.claim: Standard requirements include EN ISO 14971[2019], IEC 60601-1[2019], and IEC 60601-1-2[2013].
Software, usability, and risk management requirements reference IEC 62304-1:2015, IEC 60601-1-6:2020, IEC 62366-1:2020, ISO 14971:2019, and ISO TR 24971:2020.
evidence.pageTarget: Medical Device Software Usability and Risk Management Standards

evidence.claim: The design output states that input requirements, usability and safety requirements, legal requirements and standards, and risk management outputs are satisfied or reflected.
evidence.evidenceText: 입력 요구사항,,,,,,,,,기능.성능 요구사항 - MRT 사항 충족 ... 사용적합성 및 안전 요구사항 - MRT 사항 충족 ... 법적 요구 사항 및 표준 - 관련 규정 충족 ... 위험관리 출력물 - 관련 규정 충족

evidence.claim: The output review confirmed legal requirements and standards as suitable for medical device regulatory requirements.
evidence.evidenceText:
"법적 요구사항
및 표준",,,,,,"BOM, 주요부품리스트 및 승인원은 의료기기 규격요구사항에 적합한가?",,,,,,,,,,,,Yes

evidence.claim: The verification report records GT1717C measured weight as 3.95 kg and GT1717CP measured weight as 4.2 kg against criteria of 4.3 kg and 4.5 kg respectively.
The verification report records MTF and DQE results for GT1717C and GT1717CP meeting listed criteria.
evidence.pageTarget: GT1717C and GT1717CP Image Quality Verification

evidence.claim: Console software verification includes security, search, image acquisition, image storage, image transfer, program close, DICOM transfer, DICOM print, zoom, rotation, contrast adjustment, and partial magnification, all marked PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Console Software ... 보안기능 ... PASS ... DICOM 적합성 (전송) ... PASS ... DICOM 적합성 (출력) ... PASS

evidence.claim: Design validation records product safety, EMC, vibration/drop reliability, and pressure reliability review results as pass.
evidence.evidenceText: 제품 SAFETY ... IEC 60601-1 테스트 ... O ... 제품 EMC ... IEC 60601-1-2 테스트 ... O ... 신뢰성 (진동/낙하) ... O ... 신뢰성 (면압) ... O

evidence.claim: The design transfer package distributes BOM, manual, labels, packaging specification, MCU firmware, drawings, assembly process chart, inspection criteria, reliability report, outgoing inspection criteria, approval documents, product standard, and technical documents.
evidence.evidenceText: 설계 및 개발 이관서 ... BOM ... Manual ... 라벨 ... 포장사양서 ... MCU Firmware ... 도면 ... 조립 공정도 ... 검사 기준서 ... 신뢰성 Report ... 출하검사 기준서 ... 승인원 ... 제품표준서 ... 기술문서

evidence.claim: Part Lists for GT1717C and GT1717CP have Document Nos. A-PRTL-CYN-GT1717C and A-PRTL-CYN-GT1717CP, Rev No. 0, Rev Date 2026.04.13.
evidence.evidenceText: Document No.,A-PRTL-CYN-GT1717C ... Rev No.,0 ... Rev Date,2026.04.13 ... Document No.,A-PRTL-CYN-GT1717CP ... Rev No.,0 ... Rev Date,2026.04.13

reviewFlags.reason: Combined source contains multiple embedded forms with different dates including 4/1/25, 4/30/26, 2026.04.13, and template dates 12/1/23; documentDate selected from Part List Rev Date but package-level date is ambiguous.
Authority signal indicates MFDS/domestic and source text includes MFDS certification planning, but no issued MFDS certificate number or approval status is present.
Some rows are templates or placeholders, including 제품 평가 통보(승인)서 and 도면접수 대장 entries with 홍길동 and 12/1/23, and should not be treated as completed CYAN project records.
Revision metadata is form-specific: several forms show REV.00 while Part Lists show Rev No. 0; no single master revision for the combined workbook is stated.
